description: The CopyGlobalTransform component is used to ensure that one object has the exact same global transform (position and rotation) as another object.

fields.Source: The object that serves as the transform reference.
fields._posDrive: The field that is driven to match the global position of the source. This automatically gets populated with the position field of the slot that this component is added to.
fields._rotDrive: The field that is driven to match the global rotation of the source. This automatically gets populated with the rotation field of the slot that this component is added to.
